filters.q: =in:sent newer_than:1d ("Web Risks & Usage" OR "User App Risks" OR "Executive - Daily" OR "Security Audit Report" OR "auto backup")

parameters.subject: 🚨 Sophos Daily Security Report
parameters.message:
=

🚀 Sophos AI Security Report

{{ new Date().toLocaleString("en-IN", { dateStyle: "medium", timeStyle: "short" }) }}

Backup Status: {{($json.backup_status || "").toUpperCase() === "YES" ? "✅ Successful" : "❌ Failed"}}

AI Summary

{{ $json.summary && $json.summary.trim() ? $json.summary : "No summary available" }}

🧑‍💻 Top Internet Usage

{{ ($json.high_usage_users && $json.high_usage_users.length > 0) ? $json.high_usage_users.map(u => `
${u.user || "-"} ${u.bytes || "0"}
`).join("") : `

No high usage detected

` }}

🌐 Top Websites

{{ ($json.top_websites && $json.top_websites.length > 0) ? $json.top_websites.map(w => `
${w.site || "-"} ${w.bytes || "0"}
`).join("") : `

No website data

` }}

📱 Top Applications

{{ ($json.top_applications && $json.top_applications.length > 0) ? $json.top_applications.map(a => `
${a.app || "-"} ${a.bytes || "0"}
`).join("") : `

No application data

` }}

🔥 High Risk Applications

{{ ($json.high_risk_apps && $json.high_risk_apps.length > 0) ? $json.high_risk_apps.map(a => `
${a.app || "-"} ${a.bytes || "0"}
`).join("") : `

No high risk applications found

` }}

Application Risk

{{$json.application_risk || "N/A"}}

📂 Top Categories

{{ ($json.top_categories && $json.top_categories.length > 0) ? $json.top_categories.map(c => `
${c.category || "-"} ${c.bytes || "0"}
`).join("") : `

No category data

` }}

🏢 Top User Group

{{ ($json.top_user_groups && $json.top_user_groups.length > 0) ? $json.top_user_groups.map(g => `
${g.group || "-"} ${g.bytes || "0"}
`).join("") : `

No group data

` }}

⚠️ Suspicious Activity

{{ ($json.suspicious_activity && $json.suspicious_activity.length > 0) ? $json.suspicious_activity.map(a => `
👤 ${a.user || "-"}
🔗 ${a.site || "-"}
${a.category || ""}
`).join("") : `

No suspicious activity

` }}

Overall Risk Level

{{$json.risk_level || "N/A"}}

parameters.text:
=🚀 *Sophos AI Security Report*

🗓️ {{ new Date().toLocaleString("en-IN") }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💾 *Backup Status:* 
{{$json.backup_status === "YES" ? "✅ Successful" : "❌ Failed"}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🧠 *AI Summary*
{{$json.summary || "No summary available"}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

👤 *Top Internet Usage*
{{$json.high_usage_users?.length 
? $json.high_usage_users.map(u => `• ${u.user} → ${u.bytes}`).join('\n') 
: 'No high usage detected'}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🌐 *Top Websites*
{{$json.top_websites?.length 
? $json.top_websites.map(w => `• ${w.site} → ${w.bytes}`).join('\n') 
: 'No website data'}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📱 *Top Applications*
{{$json.top_applications?.length 
? $json.top_applications.map(a => `• ${a.app} → ${a.bytes}`).join('\n') 
: 'No application data'}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔥 *High Risk Applications*
{{$json.high_risk_apps?.length 
? $json.high_risk_apps.map(a => `• ${a.app} → ${a.bytes}`).join('\n') 
: 'No high risk applications found'}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 *Application Risk:* {{$json.application_risk || "N/A"}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📂 *Top Categories*
{{$json.top_categories?.length 
? $json.top_categories.map(c => `• ${c.category} → ${c.bytes}`).join('\n') 
: 'No category data'}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🏢 *Top User Groups*
{{$json.top_user_groups?.length 
? $json.top_user_groups.map(g => `• ${g.group} → ${g.bytes}`).join('\n') 
: 'No group data'}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚠️ *Suspicious Activity*
{{$json.suspicious_activity?.length 
? $json.suspicious_activity.map(a => `• ${a.user} | ${a.site}`).join('\n') 
: 'No suspicious activity'}}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚨 *Overall Risk Level:* *{{$json.risk_level}}*
